name: Ben Carson
subject: My new book: A MORE PERFECT UNION
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30828948:shkIKtmVN:m:1:876315805:3ACB4D6919088F202E00F9207F65A5FD:r)
---

Dear Peter -
---
I'm very excited that my new book, **A MORE PERFECT UNION: What We The People Can Do To Reclaim Our Constitutional Liberties** , is on sale today.
I wrote it to help people understand the common sense that the Founders put into the Constitution, and to realize how their common sense has been distorted over time. I believe that in our age of political correctness, it's especially important to defend the Bill of Rights, which guarantees our freedom to speak, bear arms, practice our religion, and much more.

As someone who has performed brain surgery thousands of times, I can assure you that the Constitution isn't brain surgery. It was written for ordinary men and women, and it's short enough to read in a single sitting and carry in your pocket.

I hope you'll enjoy learning about the fascinating ways that the Founders established the greatest democracy in history -- and the ways that recent presidents, congresses, and courts have threatened that democracy.

For more information about **A MORE PERFECT UNION** and my upcoming book signing events, please visit [www.bencarsonbook.com](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30828949:shkIKtmVN:m:1:876315805:3ACB4D6919088F202E00F9207F65A5FD:r).

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

Carson America, Inc | P.O. Box 26261 | Alexandria, VA 22313

| Paid for by Carson America, Inc.
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 11, 2015.

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Add your name to stand against gun violence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
We have to act | Friend -- Gun violence isn’t an inevitability -- it’s a virus and we must do whatever we can to stop it.

Our children should feel safe going to school. They should feel safe at the movie theater. And they should feel safe in places of worship.

It’s time for gun violence prevention in this country. We must stand up to the NRA and the Republicans who would like nothing more than to villainize us for “politicizing” this moment. I won’t back down from this fight.

**Say you’re with me. Sign up to take a stand against gun violence:**

| [ | [**Add your name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjM2ODA0ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNjc3OTIyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjM2ODA0ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNjc3OTIyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

With a heavy heart,

Hillary

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjM2ODA0ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNjc3OTIyS0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjM2ODA0ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNjc3OTIyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM2ODA0ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNjc3OTIyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM2ODA0ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNjc3OTIyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjM2ODA0ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNjc3OTIyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjM2ODA0ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNjc3OTIyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjM2ODA0ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNjc3OTIyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Columba Bush
subject: Are you coming?
body:
Friend - Did you see Jeb's note below?

At the end of the month, we're flying one lucky winner to Texas to meet President George H.W. Bush, Mrs. Barbara Bush, Jeb and me.

[**All you have to do is chip in $****1**** and you'll automatically be entered to win!**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/fygztbylrnjwqpqdwbfzrwcpyywclptlzbgbjlpsdngr_idnmmzcg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Jeb loves meeting his biggest supporters, and I can't think of a better way to do that than flying you to Houston to meet the whole family.

This is your chance to meet the former President of the United States. Not many people have that opportunity, so enter now: [**Jeb2016.com/Houston-Sweepstakes-Donate/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/hfwrjsfpmwczndnvzsgrmzldffzlpdjprshscpdqvwhf_idnmmzcg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

**Remember, your flight and hotel are covered, so you have nothing to lose.**

**But hurry, this contest won 't last forever. Chip in $1 now for your chance to meet Jeb and the family: [Jeb2016.com/Houston-Sweepstakes-Donate/](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/glkqskmpntrdwfwcdkhqndjfmmdjpfspqklkrpfyctnw_idnmmzcg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

We're looking forward to meeting you,

Columba

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ddhkzrjwsmcfgbgtfrnksflbjjflwbzwkrdrcwbptmst_idnmmzcg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

**-- Begin Forwarded Message--
From: Jeb Bush
Date: October 4, 2015
Subject: Come meet me and my parents**
Friend,

Putting a face to a name is important, especially with all the emails I send you.

As you know, I'm not the only culprit. Mom and Dad have been emailing as well and I want you to be able to put a face to a name for them, too.

So I talked with them, and we're going to give you the chance to do just that. [**Today we 're launching a contest to fly one lucky winner down to Texas at the end of the month to meet Mom and Dad. All you have to do is chip in $1.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/orzgskqnmlwdfpftdkvgmdcpqqdcnpsngkrkwnpztlmz_idnmmzcg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

We'll have other contests on the campaign, but I can't promise we'll have another one like this.

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ezrljtqwphbfdcdrftklpfvcqqfvwcjwltztbwcsrhpy_idnmmzcg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

[**Enter now for your all expenses paid trip to meet "The Enforcer" and the 41st President of the United States, or as I call him, the world's greatest dad.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/mbwgmtpvsdnlwjwcltkgslzjpplzvjmvgtbtnvjqcdst_idnmmzcg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Oh, and one more thing, mom is insisting on getting a photo with our biggest supporters, so I hope you're ready to pose with the family.

Friend, don't forget, your flight and hotel is on us. All you have to do is pack your suitcase and enter now: [**Jeb2016.com/Houston-Sweepstakes-Donate/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/npkhgtkmjpdnwbwqntzhjncbkkncmbgmhtrtdmbyqpjd_idnmmzcg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

See you in Houston,

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/idzkpbcqzdmwgrgywbfkzwtrccwtqrpqkbnbmqrhydzd_idnmmzcg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=4421&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)
[You can read the full sweepstakes rules here](https://jeb2016.com/houston-sweepstakes-rules/). Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by [clicking here](https://jeb2016.com/houston-sweepstakes/). **NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE.** No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, [click here](https://jeb2016.com/houston-sweepstakes-donate/). To enter without making a contribution, [click here](https://jeb2016.com/houston-sweepstakes/). Void in Florida and where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Saturday, October 3, 2015 at 12:00 am Eastern Daylight Time and ends on Friday, October 23, 2015 at 11:59 pm Eastern Daylight Time. All entries must be received by 11:59 pm Eastern Daylight Time on Friday, October 23, 2015. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) round-trip coach class plane tickets in the continental United States on a date and to and from Destinations to be determined by Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $1,500; one (1) one-night hotel stay at one of the area hotels, with an approximate retail value of $175; two (2) tickets to attend the Q3 Mission Complete Celebration, with an approximate retail value of $0; and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $50. Approximate total retail value is $1,725. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. Restrictions are listed in the [Official Rules](https://jeb2016.com/houston-sweepstakes-rules/). The Sponsor is Jeb 2016, Inc. The Sponsor's address is PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144.

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Exciting news, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

Team Murphy just keeps on growing! I couldn't be more proud of the support we're garnering.

Senator Cory Booker, former governor Charlie Crist and Florida House Representatives Reggie Fulwood, Mia Jones, Amanda Murphy, Cynthia Stafford, and Richard Stark have all endorsed me recently. That's on top of the over 50 mayors and legislators who are already onboard -- including Reps. Ted Deutch, Lois Frankel, Alcee Hastings and Frederica Wilson.

[**Friend -- will you add your name to the list? Click here to show your support.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2150/738133e4/3a59abad/7f8e06e6/2857932195/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e151006")

Karl Rove's group, American Crossroads, has attacked me for having too much Democratic support. Personally, I think they are just getting nervous.

Having all these folks on our team means we're not alone in our belief that we can stop the partisan antics, break through the gridlock, and get things accomplished for Florida families.

"Broad support" isn't attack fodder -- it's a badge of honor. _And it 's one I wear proudly because it's how we're building a coalition to win._

I'm incredibly honored to have support from all across the Sunshine State and in the Senate. And friends -- I'd love to have your endorsement, too.

[**Take a moment today to add your name to the growing list of supporters.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2150/738133e4/3a59abad/7f8e06e6/2857932195/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e151006")

Thank you for all you do.

Patrick | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2150/738133e4/3a59abad/7f8e06e7/2857932195/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2150/738133e4/3a59abad/7f8e06e0/2857932195/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2015 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2150/738133e4/3a59abad/7f8e06e1/2857932195/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/privacy")

That's on top of the over 50 mayors and legislators who are already onboard -- including Reps. Ted Deutch, Lois Frankel, Alcee Hastings and Frederica Wilson. name: Official Bernie 2016
subject: RSVP needed: Debate watch party near Silver Spring
body:
#
Dear Bernie Supporter,
One week from today, Bernie will take the stage at the first Democratic presidential debate. And at the same time, at more than 2,700 locations across the country, **Bernie supporters are getting together not just to watch the debate -- they'll take the next step and start organizing in their communities.**
We want you to be a part of this moment with us. Can you join us?
Here's a debate watch party close to you, but [**there are lots more events, too.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2509/43f17890/57fe8d2f/621fdaf5/3252633581/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&eventtype=D&daterange=all-events")
**What:** DEBATE WATCH PARTY in Garrett Park
**Where:** Morrison house
107o7 shelley court
Garrett Park, MD 20896
**When:** Tuesday, October 13th
8:00 pm EDT
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4vmlh)
If that event doesn't work for you, there are plenty more happening. [**Find more debate watch parties near you and RSVP to attend.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2509/43f17890/57fe8d2f/621fdaf5/3252633581/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&eventtype=D&daterange=all-events")
**Can't make it next week?** It's OK -- consider [**chipping in $3 to help us pull off this organizing work and make these events awesome for other Bernie supporters.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2509/43f17890/57fe8d2f/621fdaf2/3252633581/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/event-contribute?refcode=em151006attend-dwp")
See you Tuesday,
Team Bernie

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2509/43f17890/57fe8d2f/621fdaf3/3252633581/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=em151006attend-dwp")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2509/43f17890/57fe8d2f/621fdaf0/3252633581/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2509/43f17890/57fe8d2f/621fdaf1/3252633581/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2509/43f17890/57fe8d2f/621fdafe/3252633581/VEsB/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2509/43f17890/57fe8d2f/621fdaff/3252633581/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: big moment, it's official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend -- I am in Annapolis and just filed the official paperwork to run for the United States Senate. While I have been on the campaign trail for many months, this filing makes it official. It ensures that my name will be on the ballot for the April 26th Primary and, with your continued help, for the General Election on November 8, 2016.

After the 2014 election, we know Democrats cannot take anything for granted in Maryland. We need everyone to be fully engaged. It will take all of us working together to make sure we win back the Senate from the reckless Tea Party crowd. We need to build an economy that works for everyone, enact common sense laws to end the scourge of senseless gun deaths, take urgent steps to confront the ravages of climate change, and to put our democracy back in the hands of the people rather than big monied special interests. This will require all hands on deck. It will require nothing less than a movement to change Congress.

I am committed to working with you for the change we believe in. We need to build a huge grassroots movement here in Maryland and around the country. **[Click here if we can count on you to be part of that movement from now until Election Day-- and beyond.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fdc/70cdc2ba/47a87d98/39637be/1152695121/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-strong-with-chris-?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+if+we+can+count+on+you+to+be+&utm_campaign=em100615&source=em100615")**

With so much on the line for Democrats in 2016, we need to do everything we can to take back the Senate. I need you on our team to make that happen -- **[so let me know you're all in for 2016.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fdc/70cdc2ba/47a87d98/39637b5/1152695121/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-strong-with-chris-?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+so+let+me+know+yoursquore+all+in+for+201&utm_campaign=em100615&source=em100615")**

Let's get to work!

Chris

| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fdc/70cdc2ba/47a87d98/396364b/1152695121/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em100615&source=em100615") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.
clean_body: Friend -- I am in Annapolis and just filed the official paperwork to run for the United States Senate. While I have been on the campaign trail for many months, this filing makes it official. It ensures that my name will be on the ballot for the April 26th Primary and, with your continued help, for the General Election on November 8, 2016. After the 2014 election, we know Democrats cannot take anything for granted in Maryland. We need everyone to be fully engaged. It will take all of us working together to make sure we win back the Senate from the reckless Tea Party crowd. We need to build an economy that works for everyone, enact common sense laws to end the scourge of senseless gun deaths, take urgent steps to confront the ravages of climate change, and to put our democracy back in the hands of the people rather than big monied special interests. This will require all hands on deck. It will require nothing less than a movement to change Congress. I am committed to working with you for the change we believe in. We need to build a huge grassroots movement here in Maryland and around the country. "" With so much on the line for Democrats in 2016, we need to do everything we can to take back the Senate. I need you on our team to make that happen -- "" Let's get to work! Chris | Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com.
